humanSummary.text: Read-only acceptance audit for qd node generalize-localize-workflow-command-surface at commit f32a355 found no blocking command-surface issues. The app CLI dispatches localize-project-stage, exact search found no localize-sweetie-hd or itotori.localize-sweetie-hd strings in apps/itotori/src or apps/itotori/test, suite and recipe surfaces use localize-project, --project is validated against loaded config before environment validation, and dry-run posture wording now references ITOTORI-234 v0.3. Non-blocking follow-ups were identified for audit-hygiene debt in a negative test assertion and for title-specific default project metadata that remains as alpha target data.
